para.verbatim: return human readable name of subclass
return human readable name of subclass in plural form
return name of subtype for serialization purposes
returns cached information about the number of active voxels
scale object size (all point positions)
clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources

memberdef.argsstring: (self, SimpleVolume simpleVolume, std_optional_Vector2_float minmax=..., func_bool_from_float cb='{}', bool normalPlusGrad=False)
memberdef.name: construct

para.verbatim: Clears all internal data and then creates grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call \\ref updateHistogramAndSurface) \\param normalPlusGrad true means that iso-surface normals will be along gradient, false means opposite direction \\param minmax optional data about known min and max values set a new background for the VdbVolume, if normalPlusGrad = true, use the maximum value, otherwise the minimum value

memberdef.argsstring: (self, SimpleVolumeMinMax simpleVolumeMinMax, func_bool_from_float cb='{}', bool normalPlusGrad=False)
memberdef.name: construct

para.verbatim: Clears all internal data and then creates grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call \\ref updateHistogramAndSurface) \\param normalPlusGrad true means that iso-surface normals will be along gradient, false means opposite direction set a new background for the VdbVolume, if normalPlusGrad = true, use the maximum value, otherwise the minimum value

memberdef.argsstring: (self, FloatGrid grid, Vector3f voxelSize, std_optional_Vector2_float minmax=...)
memberdef.name: construct

para.verbatim: Clears all internal data and then remembers grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call \\ref updateHistogramAndSurface) \\param minmax optional data about known min and max values
Clears all internal data and then creates grid and calculates histogram (surface is not built, call \\ref updateHistogramAndSurface)
Returns dimensions of voxel objects

this function should only be called from GUI thread because it changes rendering object, it can take some time to prepare data, so you can prepare data with progress callback by calling `prepareDataForVolumeRendering(cb)` function before calling this one
Return VdbVolume
Returns active bounds (max excluded) active bounds is box in voxel coordinates, note that voxels under (0,0,0) and voxels over (dimensions) are empty
returns true if the iso-surface is built using Dual Marching Cubes algorithm or false if using Standard Marching Cubes
return several info lines that can better describe the object in the UI
Returns current iso value
gets top limit on the number of vertices in the iso-surface
Returns indexer with more options
get active (visible) voxels
move volume rendering data to caller: basically used in RenderVolumeObject
VoxelId is numerical representation of voxel Coordinate is {x,y,z} indices of voxels in box (base dimensions space, NOT active dimensions) Point is local space coordinate of point in scene
Returns Float grid which contains voxels data, see more on openvdb::FloatGrid
does the object have any model available (but possibly empty), e.g. ObjectMesh has valid mesh() or ObjectPoints has valid pointCloud()
mesh object can be seen if the mesh has at least one edge
returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap
Returns histogram
Call this function in main thread post processing if you call setActiveBounds from progress bar thread
prepare data for volume rendering returns false if canceled or voxel data is empty
Calculates and returns new histogram
Calculates and return new mesh or error message

memberdef.argsstring: (self, VdbVolume volume, float iso, func_bool_from_float cb='{}')
memberdef.name: recalculateIsoSurface

para.verbatim: Same as above, but takes external volume
reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme
returns overriden file extension used to serialize voxels inside this object, nullptr means defaultSerializeVoxelsFormat()

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Box3i activeBox, func_bool_from_float cb='{}', bool updateSurface=True)
memberdef.name: setActiveBounds

para.verbatim: Sets active bounds for some simplifications (max excluded) active bounds is box in voxel coordinates, note that voxels under (0,0,0) and voxels over (dimensions) are empty NOTE: don't forget to call `invalidateActiveBoundsCaches` if you call this function from progress bar thread

sets some dirty flags for the object (to force its visual update) \\param mask is a union of DirtyFlags flags \\param invalidateCaches whether to automatically invalidate model caches (pass false here if you manually update the caches)

memberdef.argsstring: (self, bool on, bool updateSurface=True, func_bool_from_float cb='{}')
memberdef.name: setDualMarchingCubes

para.verbatim: sets whether to use Dual Marching Cubes algorithm for visualization (true) or Standard Marching Cubes (false); \\param updateSurface forces immediate update

memberdef.argsstring: (self, float iso, func_bool_from_float cb='{}', bool updateSurface=True)
memberdef.name: setIsoValue

para.verbatim: Sets iso value and updates iso-surfaces if needed: Returns true if iso-value was updated, false - otherwise
sets top limit on the number of vertices in the iso-surface
overrides file extension used to serialize voxels inside this object: must start from '.', nullptr means serialize in defaultSerializeVoxelsFormat()
set active (visible) voxels (using only in Volume Rendering mode)
set voxel point positioner for Marching Cubes (only for Standard Marching Cubes)
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object
Returns iso surface, empty if iso value is not set
Sets external histogram for this object and returns back previous histogram of this
Updates histogram, by stored grid (evals min and max values from grid) rebuild iso surface if it is present
Sets external surface mesh for this object and returns back previous mesh of this
Sets external vdb volume for this object and returns back previous vdb volume of this
Return VdbVolume

Generated from: MR::ObjectVoxels Aliases: std_shared_ptr_ChangeSurfaceAction_Obj, std_shared_ptr_ChangeGridAction_Obj, std_shared_ptr_ChangVoxelSelectionAction_Obj, std_shared_ptr_ObjectVoxels, ChangeSurfaceAction.Obj, ChangeGridAction.Obj, ChangeActiveBoxAction.Obj, std_shared_ptr_ChangeActiveBoxAction_Obj, ChangeDualMarchingCubesAction.Obj, ChangeIsoAction.Obj, ChangVoxelSelectionAction.Obj, std_shared_ptr_ChangeDualMarchingCubesAction_Obj, std_shared_ptr_ChangeIsoAction_Obj
This class stores information about voxels object
